title: OmniFormatter JavaScript / TypeScript / JSX / TSX / Vue / Svelte / Angular / Astro / CoffeeScript Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for JavaScript-ecosystem languages. Defaults match Prettier 3.x.

semi.description: Add semicolons at end of statements. When false, relies on ASI (dangerous — see rules).

jsxSingleQuote.description: [JSX/TSX] Use single quotes in JSX attributes.

bracketSameLine.description: [JSX/TSX] Put the closing > of JSX elements on the same line as the last prop.

moduleSystem.description: Preferred module system: ES Modules (import/export) or CommonJS.

ts__strictTypeChecking.description: [TypeScript] Enable strict mode in tsconfig (strictNullChecks, noImplicitAny, etc.).

vue__indentScriptAndStyle.description: [Vue SFC] Indent <script> and <style> blocks inside .vue files.

vue__singleFileComponentOrder.description: [Vue] Order of blocks in a Single File Component.
